Operation 'convert-voice-file' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. The original summary is parenthetical and unclear about the core action. The description lacks critical details: it doesn't specify what inputs are required (audio file format, target voice parameter), what output format is returned, or clarify the streaming behavior. An AI agent needs to understand: (1) what file formats are accepted, (2) how to specify the target voice, (3) what the response format is, and (4) whether files are retained. The improved version clarifies the action (convert audio to target voice), specifies inputs (audio file + target voice reference), outputs (streamed converted audio in specified format), and side effects (original file not permanently stored).

data.current_description: Converts uploaded audio to the target voice, returning a streamed file.
data.summary_suggestion: Convert audio file to target voice
data.description_suggestion: Converts an uploaded audio file to a specified target voice using voice conversion technology. Accepts audio file input and a target voice reference. Returns the converted audio as a streamed file in the specified format. The original audio file is processed but not permanently stored after conversion.
data.reasoning: The original summary is parenthetical and unclear about the core action. The description lacks critical details: it doesn't specify what inputs are required (audio file format, target voice parameter), what output format is returned, or clarify the streaming behavior. An AI agent needs to understand: (1) what file formats are accepted, (2) how to specify the target voice, (3) what the response format is, and (4) whether files are retained. The improved version clarifies the action (convert audio to target voice), specifies inputs (audio file + target voice reference), outputs (streamed converted audio in specified format), and side effects (original file not permanently stored).

data.current_description: Streams synthesized speech using the specified voice. The response is a stream of JSON objects including audio encoded in base64.
data.summary_suggestion: Stream synthesized speech as JSON objects
data.description_suggestion: Streams synthesized speech using the specified voice as a continuous stream of JSON objects. Each object contains audio data encoded in base64 and metadata. data.current_description: Streams synthesized speech using the specified voice as a binary file stream.
data.summary_suggestion: Stream synthesized speech as binary audio file
data.description_suggestion: Streams synthesized speech using the specified voice as a continuous binary audio file stream. If no voice is provided, a novel voice will be generated dynamically. Returns raw audio data in the requested format, enabling real-time playback and low-latency applications.

message: Operation 'create-voice' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description lacks context about generation ID source, voice availability after creation, and return value details. Added clarification about the workflow (generation ID from synthesis), voice persistence, and response structure for improved AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Saves a new custom voice to your account using the specified TTS generation ID.
data.description_suggestion: Saves a new custom voice to your account using the specified TTS generation ID from a previous synthesis operation. The voice becomes available for future TTS requests and can be referenced by its assigned voice ID. Returns the created voice object with metadata including voice ID, name, and provider information.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks context about generation ID source, voice availability after creation, and return value details. Added clarification about the workflow (generation ID from synthesis), voice persistence, and response structure for improved AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Lists voices you have saved in your account, or voices from the Voice Library.
data.description_suggestion: Lists available voices including custom voices saved to your account and voices from the Voice Library. Supports pagination and filtering by voice provider. Returns a paginated collection of voice objects with metadata including voice ID, name, and provider information.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks details about filtering options, pagination support, and response structure. Enhanced to clarify available filtering/pagination parameters and return value format for better AI agent understanding of query capabilities.

message: Operation 'delete-voice' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details about voice unavailability after deletion, required parameters (voice ID and provider), return value, and irreversibility. data.current_description: Deletes a previously generated custom voice.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a previously generated custom voice from your account. The voice will no longer be available for future TTS requests. Requires the voice ID and provider. Returns confirmation of deletion. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details about voice unavailability after deletion, required parameters (voice ID and provider), return value, and irreversibility.
